title: Anlia and Eben Etzebeth to welcome second Bok baby
bodyText:
ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Springbok champion Eben Etzebeth and his wife, who recently celebrated their second wedding anniversary, announced on social media on Monday morning that they will be welcoming a second child.

After their first child’s birth in January 2024, the couple are looking forward to expanding their small brood and welcoming another baby girl.

The announcement was shared by the couple in a joint post on Instagram on Monday morning. They wrote:


> “Baby Etzebeth #2 on the way! Can’t wait to welcome our little wild flower girl!”


The couple shared the exciting news with a family photo. Anlia sports a baby bump with a toddler at her hip, with Eben in all-smiles at her side, teddy bear in tow.

As Eben and Anlia celebrate their anniversary, they continue to inspire fans with their love, devotion, and growing family. Here’s to many more years of happiness for the Etzebeths!

Article: Woman and Home Magazine

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
